query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime urban street scene beneath an elevated steel railway structure. A bright street lamp illuminates the center of an intersection where a dark sedan is parked along the left curb near a fire hydrant, and a white car is visible on the right. Storefronts with awnings and illuminated signage line the block in the background, visible through the support columns of the overhead tracks. The sky is dark above the buildings and railway girders.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime urban street scene beneath an elevated steel railway structure, dominated by a sickly orange sodium vapor color cast that washes every surface in an unhealthy, contaminated hue. A bright street lamp illuminates the center of an intersection where a dark sedan is parked along the left curb near a fire hydrant, and a white car is visible on the right. Storefronts with awnings and illuminated signage line the block in the background, visible through the support columns of the overhead tracks, all tinted by the oppressive warm glow. The sky appears dark above the buildings and railway girders, contrasting with the orange-soaked street below.
